Gathering field…
Decision support, not an auto-trader. Invariant runway (budget = 0.823% of extreme, the 2026-equivalent of 350t) makes the game identical across price eras. Trained exclusively on 2026; out-of-sample AUC across 9 regime-spread months: EXODUS min 0.735 / med 0.754 · HORIZON med 0.752 · SURGE ladder (range-expansion, direction-agnostic): ≥½R med 0.877 · ≥1R med 0.814 · ≥2R med 0.826 (floor 0.76). Regime gate: 24h efficiency ratio ≥ trailing 30-day p75 (a-priori, self-normalizing) — in backtest, edge only cleared maker fees when the gate was open. Further extension beyond the current extreme tested UNPREDICTABLE (AUC ≈ 0.50) — no oracle is offered for it, by design. Oracles read the field at closed-minute boundaries, matching training semantics.
יוֹמָןJournal · candles & completed runways
Exports the persistent Shefa candle archive, the current live partial minute, and every completed runway retained in Shefa’s runway archive. Each runway carries its start, peak, completion, side, prices, extraction, duration and original ledger record.
